description_long: This nightstand features a classic rectangular shape with two spacious drawers, each adorned with ornate gold-colored handles. The body is crafted from a reddish-brown wood, with decorative carvings along the edges and legs, giving it an elegant, vintage appearance. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for supporting lamps, books, or other small items. The legs are short and intricately carved, providing both stability and a touch of sophistication. The drawers are likely constructed with wooden interiors and metal hardware for the handles and runners. The overall design suggests a piece intended for indoor use, but it could be repurposed for sheltered urban environments.
description: A reddish-brown wooden nightstand with two ornate gold-handled drawers and decorative carved legs, exuding a vintage, elegant style.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with gold handles and detailed carvings on the legs and edges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the nightstand and the carved side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel with visible carved lower edges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the carvings and depth seen in view 1.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
